text: Nobody really cares until it's too late
title: Nobody really cares
description: A reflection on how people often overlook those around them until they are gone. This quote captures the quiet heartbreak of feeling invisible while still present.
seoTitle: Nobody really cares until it's too late | grumpy.gr
seoDescription: A reflection on feeling invisible and overlooked — until it is too late.

text: I smile so they don't ask questions
title: I smile so they don't ask questions
description: The quiet armor we wear every day. Behind every smile can be a wall built to keep people from looking too close.
seoTitle: I smile so they don't ask questions | grumpy.gr
seoDescription: Behind every smile can be a wall built to keep people from looking too close.

text: I'm fine is the biggest lie
title: I'm fine is the biggest lie
description: Two words that carry the weight of the world. I'm fine has become the universal language of people who are anything but.
seoTitle: I'm fine is the biggest lie | grumpy.gr
seoDescription: Two words that carry the weight of the world.
